scope_note: Caltech’s official first-year applicant pages describe a required SAT/ACT policy rather than publishing score bands here. This panel stays policy-focused and adds the related AP/IB submission note from Caltech’s application checklist.
policy: Caltech requires first-year applicants to submit either the SAT or the ACT. If applicants have taken AP or IB exams, Caltech also asks them to submit those scores.

claims.claim: Caltech requires first-year applicants to submit either the SAT or the ACT.
If applicants have taken AP or IB examinations, Caltech says they will be asked to submit those scores as well.
